creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try the patches from https://aur.archlinux.org/cgit/aur.git/tree/?h=libva-vdpau-driver-wayland ("sigfpe-crash" or "xwayland" may help).
Alternatively, try https://github.com/elFarto/nvidia-vaapi-driver/pull/220

For example, www/firefox supports VA-API (via media.ffmpeg.vaapi.enabled) but not NVDEC.
